name: Ray Romano
blurb: He created and starred as Ray Barone on CBSs Everybody Loves Raymond from 1996 to 2005, winning a Primetime Emmy as lead actor and sharing two more as producer.
bio: Raymond Albert Romano is an American stand-up comedian and actor whose observational, family-centered material led to appearances on Star Search and the Late Show with David Letterman, the latter directly setting up his own sitcom. He created and starred as Ray Barone on CBSs Everybody Loves Raymond from 1996 to 2005, winning a Primetime Emmy as lead actor and sharing two more as producer. He later voiced Manny in the Ice Age franchise and took on dramatic roles in The Big Sick and The Irishman.

timeline.ev: Competes in the Johnnie Walker Comedy Search
Performs stand-up on the Late Show with David Letterman
Stars in Everybody Loves Raymond on CBS
Releases the album Live at Carnegie Hall
Wins the Primetime Emmy for lead actor in a comedy series

accolades: Three Primetime Emmy Awards (one acting, two producing)
Emmy for Outstanding Lead Actor in a Comedy Series (2002)
